title: T-002 — getOnboardingState + updateOnboardingState Server Actions
prompt:
Implement two Next.js Server Actions that read and write `organizations.onboarding_state` per PRD §14.3 resume + state-tracking contract.

`getOnboardingState(orgId)`: returns the parsed `OnboardingState` (uses Zod schema from T-001). Used by wizard launcher (T-004) to decide which step to show; supports resume capability per PRD §14.3 (line 1532).

`updateOnboardingState(orgId, patch)`: merges patch into current state, refreshes `last_activity_at = now()`, persists; rejects if patch tries to set `current_step` outside 1..6 or push duplicate step into `completed_steps`. On step 1 first-write, sets `started_at = now()` if null.

Do NOT bundle: skip handler (T-003), UI (T-004..T-010), schema (T-001).

RED test command: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-state.actions`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions for read/write of onboarding_state JSONB; parses with Zod from T-001; sets started_at on first step-1 write.
pipeline_inputs.details: Both actions live in apps/web/app/(onboarding)/_actions/onboarding-state.actions.ts. They use the shared onboardingStateSchema from packages/shared (T-001) and the db client. Update is a JSONB merge (not replace) so concurrent step writes don't clobber sibling fields. Returns typed errors INVALID_STEP and DUPLICATE_COMPLETION instead of throwing.
out_of_scope: Restart/Back navigation (covered by gap-backlog S-PU1; out of scope for this PRD slice)
acceptance_criteria: Given orgId with default onboarding_state, when getOnboardingState(orgId) runs, then returned object parses cleanly through onboardingStateSchema and current_step=1.
Given updateOnboardingState(orgId, {current_step:2, completed_steps:[1]}), when called on default state, then DB row reflects merge AND started_at and last_activity_at are non-null ISO timestamps.
Given updateOnboardingState(orgId, {current_step:7}), when called, then result is typed error INVALID_STEP and DB row is unchanged.
Given updateOnboardingState(orgId, {completed_steps:[1,1]}), when called, then result is typed error DUPLICATE_COMPLETION and DB row is unchanged.
test_strategy: RED: vitest spec exercising all 4 AC against in-memory test DB; expect failures before action implementation.
GREEN: implement actions; all AC pass.
risk_red_lines: Do not perform full row REPLACE; must JSONB-merge to avoid race-condition data loss between sibling fields.
Do not throw on invalid input — return typed error so UI can render localized copy.
Do not call from outside apps/web/app/(onboarding) tree (Server Action import boundary).
